summary: V10.6 end-to-end testing PASS — Backend 15/15 + Frontend 100% testids. Hybrid Auth verified (login returns token + Set-Cookie SameSite=None/Secure/HttpOnly; /auth/me accepts Bearer-only, cookie-only, or both). Stripe LIVE donation of 2 RON returns cs_live_* session. OCR template-placeholders returns 5 placeholders (≥3 required) with inner/label/type, smart-extract-llm (Claude Sonnet) returns ≥1 placeholder with suggested_key/label/field_type. NEW /api/ocr/fill-template endpoint works: replaces placeholders in DOCX, returns DOCX MIME + attachment Content-Disposition + X-Replacements-Applied=3 header; rejects PDF with 400 'Doar DOCX'; rejects invalid JSON; accepts empty replacements with applied=0. Frontend: tab-completare visible at /gaze-naturale/{pid}; upload→detect heuristic flow renders 5 placeholder-cards/inputs, filled-counter '0/5 completate', save & download buttons. Regression intact: /api/me/plan=developer, GET project pid match, dossier.zip with ≥10 files.

tests_executed.detail: Simulates Safari ITP mobile — Bearer token alone is sufficient for /auth/me.
session_id starts with cs_live_, URL is checkout.stripe.com.
5 placeholders detected for DOCX with <NUME>, <ADRESA>, <EMAIL>, (Completați...), ________. Fields inner/label/type present.
POST /api/ocr/fill-template returns DOCX MIME + attachment + X-Replacements-Applied=3. Returned DOCX contains 'Ion Popescu', 'Str. Aurel Vlaicu 15', 'ion@example.com'; '<NUME>' removed.
upload-dropzone, select-file-btn, mode-toggle, mode-ai-btn, mode-heuristic-btn, detect-btn all present.

After file-input set_input_files + click detect-btn: fill-form-section appears, 5 placeholder-card-*, 5 placeholder-input-*, filled-counter='0 / 5 completate', save-to-project-btn + download-filled-btn visible.

critical_code_review_comments: ocr_extract.py file is now 673 lines — getting close to the 700-line refactor threshold. Consider splitting /fill-template + _docx_replace_text into a separate module (e.g., ocr_fill.py) since it has different concerns (template completion vs. extraction).

fill-template endpoint accepts replacements as a Form string and re-parses JSON — works but a Pydantic JSON body alongside an UploadFile would be cleaner via fastapi.Body(...) or a dedicated multipart model. Current design is acceptable; FastAPI's multipart+JSON combination is awkward by spec.

The 'NOU' badge on tab-completare is hardcoded in the JSX. Recommend a small util/feature-flag so future tabs flagged 'NEW' can fade out automatically after N days or once a user has interacted with them.
No backend test was found for /api/ocr/fill-template prior to this iteration — recommend wiring this suite into CI so regressions on the multipart DOCX endpoint are caught early.

Hybrid Auth: verify that the SameSite=None cookie also works in Firefox strict tracking-protection mode (covered by current code path but worth a manual cross-browser sanity check at production deploy time).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required testids verified + end-to-end upload/detect flow)

seed_data_creation: Read-only tests. Stripe checkout test creates a real LIVE Checkout Session (no payment captured, abandoned). One real Stripe cs_live_* session generated per test run — operationally harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V10.6 PASS 15/15 backend + full UI flow. Test DOCX fixture is built inline in pytest via python-docx (no external file). To re-test fill-template, the same test_v106_features.py is reusable. Test DOCX file at /tmp/test_template_v106.docx contains: <NUME>, <ADRESA>, (Completați telefonul), ________, <EMAIL> placeholders → 5 placeholders detected by heuristic. Stripe LIVE 2 RON works (Stripe enforces a min ~RON 2 equiv; this test confirms the gate). Bearer-only auth path is functional for Safari ITP fallback. Frontend tab path: /gaze-naturale/<pid> → click [data-testid='tab-completare']. File input is hidden — use page.locator('[data-testid=file-input]').set_input_files(...) NOT click select-file-btn.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
